expectedQuestions.decisionValue: PMBOK edition strategy → 7th ed = principles-based, full read less useful than simulator + agile focus. Changes PMBOK reading strategy significantly.

rita_mulcahy.citation: Conversational style; experienced PM can do 1.5-2min. r/pmp: 30-day AT/AT/AT cases for 5yr+ PMs.

pmbok_selective.citation: Principle-based, dense, abstract. Full 756p NOT needed — selective ~200p.

expectedStrategy: Rita main (550p, priority 1) + PMBOK selective reference (~200p, NOT full 756p, priority 2) + weekly mock exam (check, priority 1)
Total: Rita 27.5hr + PMBOK selective 20hr + simulator 7hr + overhead 2hr = 56.5hr vs 55hr available ✅
Weekday: Rita 45min + notes 15min; Weekend: Rita 2hr + PMBOK reference 30min + mock 30min
Experienced PM: skip known Rita sections → focus on agile/hybrid concepts (new after 2023 PMP)
warnings: Almost exactly fits — no buffer for slow weeks
toneExpectation: experience-respectful — '이미 실무에서 많이 하신 것들이에요. 시험은 용어와 PMI 사고방식 파악이 핵심입니다.'
